data.title: Mu Wang Zhi Wang: You Du Zhan
data.title_english: Great King of the Tomb: Battle in the Netherworld
title_synonyms: Great King of the Grave: Battle in the Netherworld
The King Of Tomb: The Battle of You City
data.synopsis:
The 12th year of the Tai Calendar Luo Wuzi was ordered to build the Tomb of King Qin. Then he was given the title King of the Tomb. After building it, he became the King of the Tomb City and ruled over the Tomb of the World.

Since then The tomb sect in Jianghu is in its heyday. But then, The Tomb sect is split. King of the Tombs heir, Mu Rong Shi may be a Tomb Guards Sect. The Luo family ran away, and build the Luo Family Ancestral Hall as a separate faction and is understood because of the Tomb Attackers Sect.

When the Two sects meet If a subsequent generation of the Tomb Attacker Sect succeeded in getting Tomb Destruction Orders at the Nine-Locked Chain Tomb they’ll get the King’s Tomb Throne. For thousands of years both the good Sect, the Tomb Attacker Sect, and therefore, the Tomb Guards Sect very difficult to separate. To the present day, king Palace deliberately put treasure within the tomb. Tomb Guards Sect, Mu Rong Xian, to point out his loyalty he smuggled the tomb guard against the outside.

(Source: Kurina Official)

titles.title: Da Zhentan Fuermosi: Tao Yu Da Zhuibu
Sherlock Holmes and the Great Escape
大侦探福尔摩斯：逃狱大追捕
The Great Detective Sherlock Holmes: The Greatest Jail-Breaker

data.title: Da Zhentan Fuermosi: Tao Yu Da Zhuibu
data.title_english: The Great Detective Sherlock Holmes: The Greatest Jail-Breaker
data.title_japanese: 大侦探福尔摩斯：逃狱大追捕
title_synonyms: Sherlock Holmes and the Great Escape
data.synopsis:
In the late 19th century, the Robin Hood-like thief March kept Scotland Yard busy by robbing the rich to help the poor, but Sherlock Holmes captured him at his illegitimate daughter Kitty's birthday party. Four years later, March attacked Scarface, the prison's chief thief, and escaped by scaling the wall. Holmes, knowing March had ulterior motives, allowed him to fulfill his wish before taking him to surrender. But Scarface suddenly reappeared, pointing his sword at Kitty. 

Holmes and Watson, to save the innocent, joined forces with the twin detectives, Lee the Gorilla and Foxy, to rescue her. A life-or-death battle unfolded amidst a sky full of fireworks… The popular Sherlock Holmes book series is brought to the big screen for the first time, combining knowledge and entertainment—a must-see for adults and children alike!

(Source: Douban, translated)

titles.title: ワンダーエッグ・プライオリティ

data.title: Wonder Egg Priority
data.title_japanese: ワンダーエッグ・プライオリティ
data.synopsis:
Following the suicide of her best and only friend, Koito Nagase, Ai Ooto is left grappling with her new reality. With nothing left to live for, she follows the instructions of a mysterious entity and gets roped into purchasing an egg, or specifically, a Wonder Egg.

Upon breaking the egg in a world that materializes during her sleep, Ai is tasked with saving people from the adversities that come their way. In doing so, she believes that she has moved one step closer to saving her best friend. With this dangerous yet tempting opportunity in the palms of her hands, Ai enters a place where she must recognize the relationship between other people's demons and her own.

As past trauma, unforgettable regrets, and innate fears hatch in the bizarre world of Wonder Egg Priority, a young girl discovers the different inner struggles tormenting humankind and rescues them from their worst fears.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Lei Su Deng: Yi Fei Chong Tian

data.title: Lei Su Deng: Yi Fei Chong Tian
data.synopsis: Hover Champs tells the story of some boys who compete in remote-controlled helicopters: Matthew and Zoe. Matthew is a 13-year-old boy who returns, with his mother, to the town where he was born. There he meets Zoe, a girl with great ability to drive remote-controlled helicopters. Matthew manages, on the first day, to break Zoe's record and she proposes that he form a team to compete together.

titles.title: Yi Fei Chong Tian: Tianji Zhang Qi

data.title: Yi Fei Chong Tian: Tianji Zhang Qi
Zhi Duoduo: Jieri Jianianhua
data.synopsis: Educational anime series made by ICAC in Hong Kong.

data.title: Danzhu Chuanshuo
data.synopsis:
In the year 1008 of the Eastern Calendar, in a fantastical world where pinball is a popular game, young Ouyang Xiaofeng seeks out the legendary Pinball Immortal to learn advanced pinball skills. Later, at the Immortal Pearl Mountain where the Immortal resides, he meets four other friends who fight alongside him, and they all become his apprentices. 

The lurking Ghost Count, however, covets the five Pinball Demons (Xiaofeng and his friends' demonic fighters), wanting to obtain their power and rule the entire pinball world. To acquire the five Pinball Demons and the "Pinball Scepter" and "Pinball Ring" scattered among the people, the Ghost Count is determined to eliminate Ouyang Xiaofeng and his four companions. Through three increasingly difficult matches, the Ghost Count obtains the "Pinball Scepter" and "Pinball Ring," and then, relying on their power, seizes the five Demons.

(Source: Sohu, translated)
